caption: A person's hand holds a graded baseball card in a protective plastic case. The card features a player in a dark jersey with "BREWERS" written across the bottom in blue and yellow text, and the name "KESTON HIURA" printed below it. A blue signature is visible across the image of the player. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap is partially visible behind a banner that reads "BREAKS" in large white letters. A small overlay graphic in the corner displays a logo and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". Throughout the sequence, the hand holds the card steadily, while a white piece of paper or card enters the frame from the right, sliding behind the graded case to provide a contrasting background. The setting appears to be an indoor workspace with various items, including boxes, scattered on a table.
